column5: だけ = neutral only; no negation. しか = only (requires negation).
column6: Positive verb → だけ. Negative → しか.

column5: ばかり = emphasis on repetition/excess. だけ = neutral.
しか + negative = exclusive. だけ = works with any polarity.
column6: + negative = しか. + positive = だけ.

column5: や = non-exhaustive (implies more). と = exhaustive list.
column6: Open list → や. Complete list → と.

column1: りんご___ぶどう___食べたいです。
column5: とか = very casual, softer. や = standard non-exhaustive.
と = binary/exhaustive choice. や = open options.
column6: Two choices = と. Multiple = や.

column5: よ = assertion (telling info). ね = seeking agreement.
column6: Informing → よ. Seeking consensus → ね.

column5: ね = seeks agreement on shared observation. よ = asserts new.
column6: Shared observation → ね. New info → よ.

column5: よ = emphatic encouragement. ね = softer invitation.
column6: Strong push → よ. Gentle invitation → ね.

column5: かもしれません = lower certainty. でしょう = higher certainty.
column6: 50-50 guess → かも. 70%+ sure → でしょう.

column5: でしょう = confident prediction. かもしれません = uncertain.
column6: Weather forecast → でしょう. Wild guess → かも.

column1: 間違えるかもしれません___。
column5: かもしれません = I might mess up. でしょう = you probably will.
column6: Self-doubt → かも. External prediction → でしょう.

column5: より = comparative (A vs B). もっと = intensifier.
column6: Comparing two → より. \"More\" → もっと.

column5: もっと = intensifies (more of current). より = compares.
column6: More of what I like → もっと.

column5: のほう = emphatic topicalization. より = baseline.
column6: Emphasizing → のほう. Neutral → より.
